metadata.description: Claude + Obsidian coworking: vault-grounded synthesis, PKM hygiene, drafting, session capture, and advisor personas over a local MCP bridge.

plugins.name: claude-obsidian
plugins.description: Cowork with Claude in your Obsidian vault: synthesize notes, tag and link the graph, draft from outlines, capture sessions as notes, build HTML artifacts, run spec-based builds, and get manifest-* advisor roadmaps — all via the Companion for Claude MCP bridge.
